name: Georgia Department of Corrections — Reentry Services
description: The Georgia Department of Corrections Reentry Services unit coordinates statewide pre-release planning, transitional programming, and community partner connections for individuals preparing to leave GDC custody. Staff work with the Department of Community Supervision, local nonprofits, and workforce agencies on housing, employment, and treatment referrals before and after release. This office provides planning and referrals—not a walk-in crisis line or emergency cash provider.
description_es: La unidad de Servicios de Reinserción del Departamento de Correcciones de Georgia coordina planificación previa a la liberación, programación de transición y conexiones con aliados comunitarios para personas que preparan salir de custodia de GDC. El personal trabaja con Supervisión Comunitaria, organizaciones locales y agencias de fuerza laboral sobre vivienda, empleo y referencias de tratamiento. Esta oficina ofrece planificación y referencias, no es una línea de crisis ni proveedor de efectivo de emergencia.
eligibility: Individuals in GDC custody or recently released seeking state reentry coordination; community partners seeking GDC engagement.
eligibility_es: Personas en custodia de GDC o recién liberadas que buscan coordinación estatal de reinserción; aliados comunitarios.
notes: Visit gdc.georgia.gov/reentry-services; coordinate through facility reentry staff and assigned DCS officer after release.
notes_es: Visite gdc.georgia.gov/reentry-services; coordine a través del personal de reinserción de la instalación y el oficial de DCS asignado.
hours: State office Monday–Friday business hours
services: Pre-release planning|Transitional programming coordination|Community partner referrals|Reentry resource navigation|DCS linkage

name: Georgia Board of Pardons and Paroles — Statewide
description: The Georgia State Board of Pardons and Paroles supervises parole decisions, clemency petitions, and community supervision policy for adults released from Georgia prisons. Field offices across Georgia manage parole reporting, supervision compliance, and referrals to reentry partners for returning citizens. Contact your assigned parole officer or regional office—not emergency housing or crisis services.
description_es: La Junta Estatal de Indultos y Libertad Condicional de Georgia supervisa decisiones de libertad condicional, peticiones de clemencia y política de supervisión comunitaria para adultos liberados de prisiones de Georgia. Las oficinas de campo gestionan reportes de libertad condicional, cumplimiento de supervisión y referencias a aliados de reinserción. Contacte a su oficial de libertad condicional asignado, no es vivienda de emergencia.
address: 2 Martin Luther King Jr. Drive SE
eligibility: Individuals under Georgia parole supervision or seeking clemency or pardon information; victims may register for notification services.
eligibility_es: Personas bajo supervisión de libertad condicional de Georgia o que buscan información sobre clemencia o indulto.
notes: Find regional field offices at pap.georgia.gov/locations; report to assigned parole officer per supervision conditions.
notes_es: Encuentre oficinas regionales en pap.georgia.gov/locations; reporte al oficial de libertad condicional asignado.
hours: State office Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m. ET
services: Parole supervision coordination|Clemency and pardon information|Field office referrals|Supervision compliance guidance

name: COMPASS — Georgia Benefits Portal
description: COMPASS is Georgia's official statewide online portal for applying for and managing Medicaid, PeachCare for Kids, SNAP food assistance, TANF cash benefits, child care subsidies, and energy assistance through the Department of Human Services Division of Family & Children Services. Justice-involved Georgians can apply for health coverage and food support after release; county DFCS offices assist with verification and redetermination.
description_es: COMPASS es el portal en línea oficial de Georgia para solicitar y administrar Medicaid, PeachCare, SNAP, asistencia en efectivo TANF, subsidios de cuidado infantil y asistencia energética a través de DFCS. Personas en reinserción pueden solicitar cobertura de salud y apoyo alimentario después de la liberación; las oficinas DFCS del condado ayudan con verificación.
eligibility: Georgia residents meeting income and program requirements for Medicaid, SNAP, or cash assistance; criminal record generally not a barrier.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Georgia que cumplan requisitos de ingresos para Medicaid, SNAP o asistencia en efectivo; los antecedentes penales generalmente no son barrera.
notes: Apply online at compass.ga.gov; call 1-877-423-4746 for DFCS Customer Contact Center; county offices at dfcs.georgia.gov/locations.
notes_es: Solicite en compass.ga.gov; llame al 1-877-423-4746; oficinas del condado en dfcs.georgia.gov/locations.
hours: Online 24/7; DFCS office hours vary by county
services: Medicaid application|SNAP enrollment|Cash assistance application|PeachCare enrollment|Benefits account management

name: DFCS — Family Assistance & Benefits Overview
description: The Georgia Division of Family & Children Services administers SNAP, Medicaid, PeachCare, TANF, and child care assistance through county DFCS offices in all 159 counties and the COMPASS online portal. DFCS helps returning citizens establish food and health benefits after release from GDC custody or county jails with local staff assisting document verification.
description_es: La División de Servicios Familiares y para Niños de Georgia administra SNAP, Medicaid, PeachCare, TANF y asistencia de cuidado infantil a través de oficinas DFCS en los 159 condados y el portal COMPASS. DFCS ayuda a ciudadanos que regresan a establecer beneficios alimentarios y de salud después de la liberación con personal local que asiste con verificación de documentos.
eligibility: Georgia residents meeting income and household-size requirements; criminal record generally not a barrier to SNAP and Medicaid.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Georgia que cumplan requisitos de ingresos y tamaño del hogar; los antecedentes penales generalmente no son barrera para SNAP y Medicaid.
notes: Apply at compass.ga.gov or visit your county DFCS office; call 1-877-423-4746; bring ID and release documents.
notes_es: Solicite en compass.ga.gov o visite su oficina DFCS del condado; llame al 1-877-423-4746; traiga identificación y documentos de liberación.
hours: County offices typically Tuesday–Thursday, 9:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m. ET
services: SNAP enrollment|Medicaid application|Cash assistance|TANF|County field office referrals

name: 211 Georgia
description: 211 Georgia is a free statewide information and referral service connecting residents to health and human services including housing, food, utilities, employment, and crisis support across all 159 counties. United Way-supported navigators help callers find local programs by need and ZIP code. 211 Georgia is a referral line—not a direct-service provider.
description_es: 211 Georgia es un servicio gratuito de información y referencia estatal que conecta a residentes con servicios de salud y humanos incluyendo vivienda, alimentos, servicios públicos, empleo y apoyo en crisis en los 159 condados. Navegadores apoyados por United Way ayudan a encontrar programas locales por necesidad y código postal. Es una línea de referencia, no un proveedor directo.
eligibility: Open to all Georgia residents; no criminal-record restrictions stated.
eligibility_es: Abierto a todos los residentes de Georgia; sin restricciones de antecedentes indicadas.
notes: Dial 211 from any Georgia phone; search resources online at georgia211.org; available for information and referral.
notes_es: Marque 211 desde cualquier teléfono de Georgia; busque recursos en georgia211.org.
hours: Available during published service hours; check georgia211.org
services: Information and referral|Housing resource navigation|Benefits referrals|Crisis resource connections

name: Georgia Legal Services Program — Statewide Intake
description: Georgia Legal Services Program is the state's primary nonprofit civil legal aid provider serving low-income Georgians outside metro Atlanta with housing, public benefits, family law, and criminal record restriction assistance under Georgia's record restriction statutes. Centralized intake routes callers to regional offices—not criminal defense.
description_es: Georgia Legal Services Program es el principal proveedor sin fines de lucro de asistencia legal civil del estado que sirve a georgianos de bajos ingresos fuera del área metropolitana de Atlanta con vivienda, beneficios públicos, derecho familiar y restricción de registros penales. La admisión centralizada enruta a oficinas regionales, no defensa penal.
eligibility: Low-income Georgia residents outside Fulton, DeKalb, Clayton, Cobb, and Gwinnett with non-criminal legal problems; LSC income limits apply.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Georgia de bajos ingresos fuera de Fulton, DeKalb, Clayton, Cobb y Gwinnett con problemas legales no penales; aplican límites de ingresos LSC.
notes: Apply online at glsp.org or call 1-800-498-9469; metro Atlanta residents use Atlanta Legal Aid at atlantalegalaid.org.
notes_es: Solicite en glsp.org o llame al 1-800-498-9469; residentes del metro de Atlanta usen Atlanta Legal Aid.
hours: Intake Monday–Friday business hours; online application 24/7
services: Civil legal representation|Record restriction assistance|Housing legal aid|Benefits advocacy|Regional office referrals

name: Georgia Department of Labor — WorkSource Georgia
description: WorkSource Georgia is the statewide workforce system connecting job seekers—including justice-involved Georgians—to American Job Centers, career coaching, unemployment services, and WIOA training referrals through regional career centers covering all 159 counties. Georgia CALLS fair-chance employer partnerships and GVRA disability employment supports are coordinated through WorkSource partners.
description_es: WorkSource Georgia es el sistema estatal de fuerza laboral que conecta a buscadores de empleo—incluidos georgianos con antecedentes penales—a Centros de Empleo Americanos, coaching de carrera, servicios de desempleo y referencias de capacitación WIOA a través de centros de carrera regionales en los 159 condados. Las alianzas de empleo justo de Georgia CALLS se coordinan a través de aliados WorkSource.
eligibility: Open to Georgia job seekers including justice-involved individuals; core career center services are free.
eligibility_es: Abierto a buscadores de empleo de Georgia incluidas personas con antecedentes penales; servicios básicos del centro de carrera son gratuitos.
notes: Find your nearest career center at dol.georgia.gov/locations/career-center; register at employgeorgia.com.
notes_es: Encuentre su centro de carrera más cercano en dol.georgia.gov/locations/career-center; regístrese en employgeorgia.com.
hours: Career centers Monday–Friday business hours
services: Job search assistance|Career coaching|WIOA training referrals|Unemployment services|Fair-chance employment navigation

name: Georgia Vocational Rehabilitation Agency — Statewide
description: The Georgia Vocational Rehabilitation Agency helps Georgians with disabilities—including justice-involved individuals with qualifying disabilities—prepare for, obtain, and maintain employment through counseling, training, job placement, and employer partnerships. GVRA offices statewide coordinate with WorkSource Georgia and DCS reentry programs. An employment rehabilitation agency—not emergency cash or housing.
description_es: La Agencia de Rehabilitación Vocacional de Georgia ayuda a georgianos con discapacidades—incluidas personas con antecedentes penales con discapacidades calificadas—a prepararse, obtener y mantener empleo a través de consejería, capacitación, colocación laboral y alianzas con empleadores. Las oficinas GVRA en todo el estado coordinan con WorkSource Georgia y programas de reinserción de DCS.
eligibility: Georgia residents with physical or mental disabilities that create employment barriers; eligibility determined through GVRA assessment.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Georgia con discapacidades físicas o mentales que crean barreras laborales; elegibilidad determinada por evaluación GVRA.
notes: Apply at gvra.georgia.gov or call 844-367-4872; offices listed at gvra.georgia.gov/about/locations.
notes_es: Solicite en gvra.georgia.gov o llame al 844-367-4872; oficinas en gvra.georgia.gov/about/locations.
hours: State and regional offices Monday–Friday business hours
services: Vocational counseling|Job placement|Skills training|Employer partnerships|Disability employment supports

name: Georgia Crisis & Access Line (GCAL)
description: The Georgia Crisis & Access Line provides free confidential 24/7 crisis intervention, mental health support, and substance use crisis referrals for Georgia residents. Trained specialists connect callers to local mobile crisis teams and treatment providers statewide. Essential for justice-involved individuals experiencing behavioral health emergencies—not a reentry housing or benefits line.
description_es: La Línea de Crisis y Acceso de Georgia ofrece intervención de crisis gratuita y confidencial 24/7, apoyo de salud mental y referencias de crisis por uso de sustancias para residentes de Georgia. Especialistas capacitados conectan a llamantes con equipos de crisis móviles y proveedores de tratamiento. Esencial para personas con antecedentes penales en emergencias de salud conductual.
eligibility: Open to anyone in Georgia experiencing a mental health, substance use, or developmental disability crisis.
eligibility_es: Abierto a cualquier persona en Georgia en crisis de salud mental, uso de sustancias o discapacidad del desarrollo.
notes: Call 800-715-4225 or text GA to 741741; also dial 988 for Suicide & Crisis Lifeline; Spanish-language support available.
notes_es: Llame al 800-715-4225 o envíe GA al 741741; también marque 988; soporte en español disponible.
hours: Available 24/7
services: Crisis counseling|Mental health referrals|Substance use crisis support|Mobile crisis team dispatch

name: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline — Georgia
description: Free confidential 24/7 crisis support for people experiencing mental health emergencies, suicidal thoughts, or substance use crises in Georgia. Trained specialists provide immediate support and can connect callers to local mobile crisis teams through GCAL. Available to anyone—not reentry-specific but essential for justice-involved individuals in crisis.
description_es: Apoyo gratuito y confidencial 24/7 para emergencias de salud mental, pensamientos suicidas o crisis por uso de sustancias en Georgia. Especialistas capacitados ofrecen apoyo inmediato y conexión a equipos de crisis móviles a través de GCAL. Disponible para cualquier persona, esencial para personas con antecedentes penales en crisis.
eligibility: Open to anyone in Georgia experiencing a mental health or suicide crisis; no eligibility restrictions.
eligibility_es: Abierto a cualquier persona en Georgia en crisis de salud mental o suicidio; sin restricciones.
notes: Call or text 988; Spanish-language support available. For immediate physical danger call 911.
notes_es: Llame o envíe texto al 988; soporte en español disponible. Para peligro físico inmediato llame al 911.
hours: Available 24/7
services: Crisis counseling|Suicide prevention support|Mental health referrals|Substance use crisis support

name: SAMHSA National Helpline
description: SAMHSA National Helpline is a statewide or regional referral resource for Georgians affected by the criminal justice system. Free confidential 24/7 treatment referral and information service for individuals and families facing mental health or substance use disorders. Provides referrals to local treatment facilities and community organizations in Georgia and nationwide. Spanish-language support available through trained specialists. Users can search by location, service type, or need to find active providers in throughout Georgia. Specialists or online tools help match people to housing, treatment, employment, legal aid, or benefits resources operated by other organizations. This entry describes a navigation hub—staff here do not replace direct services at partner agencies.
description_es: SAMHSA National Helpline es un recurso de referencia estatal o regional para georgianos afectados por el sistema de justicia penal. Los usuarios pueden buscar por ubicación, tipo de servicio o necesidad para encontrar proveedores activos en en todo Georgia. Herramientas en línea o especialistas ayudan a conectar con vivienda, tratamiento, empleo, asistencia legal o beneficios operados por otras organizaciones. Esta entrada describe un centro de navegación—el personal no reemplaza servicios directos en agencias aliadas.
eligibility: Open to anyone in the United States seeking substance use or mental health treatment information and referrals.
eligibility_es: Abierto a cualquier persona en Estados Unidos que busque información y referencias de tratamiento.
notes: TTY 800-487-4889; also use FindTreatment.gov to search Georgia providers online.
notes_es: TTY 800-487-4889; también use FindTreatment.gov para buscar proveedores en Georgia.
hours: Available 24/7
services: Partner referrals|Substance use treatment

name: FindTreatment.gov — Georgia Provider Search
description: FindTreatment.gov — Georgia Provider Search serves justice-involved adults and families rebuilding stability after incarceration in throughout Georgia. SAMHSA's online treatment locator helping Georgia residents find substance use and mental health treatment providers by location, service type, and payment options including Medicaid. Justice-involved individuals can search outpatient, residential, and MAT providers before or after release from GDC custody or county jails. Treatment may require assessment, insurance or Medicaid enrollment, and referral from courts or corrections for some beds—call intake to confirm openings. Contact this resource to confirm current intake steps, required documents, and whether walk-ins or referrals are accepted.
description_es: FindTreatment.gov — Georgia Provider Search sirve a adultos con antecedentes penales y familias que reconstruyen estabilidad después de la encarcelación en en todo Georgia. El tratamiento puede requerir evaluación, seguro o Medicaid y referencia de tribunales o correcciones para algunas plazas—llame a admisión para confirmar disponibilidad. Contacte este recurso para confirmar pasos de admisión, documentos requeridos y si aceptan visitas sin cita o referencias.
eligibility: Open to anyone searching for treatment; provider admission rules vary.
eligibility_es: Abierto a cualquier persona que busque tratamiento; las reglas de admisión varían según el proveedor.
notes: Search findtreatment.gov by Georgia county or city; filter for MAT, outpatient, or residential services.
notes_es: Busque en findtreatment.gov por condado o ciudad de Georgia; filtre por TMO, ambulatorio o residencial.
hours: Website 24/7
services: Partner referrals|Addiction treatment referrals|Substance use treatment|Residential program finder

name: Georgia Department of Driver Services — ID Services
description: Georgia Department of Driver Services issues state ID cards and driver's licenses required for employment, housing, and benefits enrollment after release. Returning citizens can apply for a Georgia ID at Customer Service Centers statewide with proof of identity and residency. Not a vital records office—contact county probate court for birth certificates.
description_es: El Departamento de Servicios de Conductores de Georgia emite tarjetas de identificación estatal y licencias de conducir necesarias para empleo, vivienda e inscripción en beneficios después de la liberación. Los ciudadanos que regresan pueden solicitar una identificación de Georgia en Centros de Servicio al Cliente con prueba de identidad y residencia. No es oficina de registros vitales.
eligibility: Georgia residents with required identity and residency documentation; fees apply for ID cards and licenses.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Georgia con documentación requerida de identidad y residencia; aplican tarifas para tarjetas de identificación.
notes: Find Customer Service Centers at dds.georgia.gov/locations; bring certified birth certificate or passport plus proof of Georgia residency.
notes_es: Encuentre Centros de Servicio en dds.georgia.gov/locations; traiga certificado de nacimiento o pasaporte más prueba de residencia.
hours: Customer Service Center hours vary; check dds.georgia.gov
services: State ID card issuance|Driver's license services|ID renewal|Customer Service Center locator

name: Georgia Department of Public Health — Vital Records
description: Georgia Department of Public Health — Vital Records serves justice-involved adults and families rebuilding stability after incarceration in throughout Georgia. Georgia Department of Public Health Vital Records office processes requests for birth and death certificates needed for state ID, Medicaid, and employment applications after release. Returning citizens can order certified copies online or by mail with acceptable identification. Processing times vary—order early in reentry planning. Fees, proof of identity, and residency documents apply; reentry resources and legal aid partners often help gather required paperwork. Contact this resource to confirm current intake steps, required documents, and whether walk-ins or referrals are accepted.
description_es: Georgia Department of Public Health — Vital Records sirve a adultos con antecedentes penales y familias que reconstruyen estabilidad después de la encarcelación en en todo Georgia. Aplican tarifas, prueba de identidad y documentos de residencia; recursos de reinserción y aliados legales suelen ayudar a reunir el papeleo requerido. Contacte este recurso para confirmar pasos de admisión, documentos requeridos y si aceptan visitas sin cita o referencias.
eligibility: Individuals with legal right to request the record; acceptable ID required; fees apply per certificate.
eligibility_es: Personas con derecho legal a solicitar el registro; se requiere identificación aceptable; aplican tarifas por certificado.
notes: Order online at dph.georgia.gov/vital-records or call 404-679-4702; allow processing time before ID appointments.
notes_es: Ordene en línea en dph.georgia.gov/vital-records o llame al 404-679-4702; permita tiempo de procesamiento antes de citas de identificación.
hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 a.m.–4:30 p.m. ET
services: Document assistance|Certified copy processing

name: Georgia Department of Veterans Service — Reentry Supports
description: The Georgia Department of Veterans Service helps justice-involved veterans access VA benefits, disability claims, employment programs, and housing resources through county veterans service offices in every county. Veterans released from incarceration may qualify for VA health care, vocational rehabilitation, and veteran treatment court supports. Not emergency shelter—benefits navigation and advocacy.
description_es: El Departamento de Servicios para Veteranos de Georgia ayuda a veteranos con antecedentes penales a acceder a beneficios del VA, reclamaciones de discapacidad, programas de empleo y recursos de vivienda a través de oficinas de servicios para veteranos del condado. Los veteranos liberados de la encarcelación pueden calificar para atención médica del VA y tribunales de tratamiento para veteranos.
eligibility: Honorably discharged or qualifying Georgia veterans and their dependents; service documentation required.
eligibility_es: Veteranos de Georgia con baja honorable o calificados y sus dependientes; se requiere documentación de servicio.
notes: Find your county veterans service office at veterans.georgia.gov/find-your-cvs-office; free benefits claims assistance.
notes_es: Encuentre su oficina de servicios para veteranos del condado en veterans.georgia.gov; asistencia gratuita con reclamaciones.
hours: County offices Monday–Friday business hours
services: VA benefits claims assistance|Disability claims navigation|Employment program referrals|Veterans treatment court support

name: Action Ministries — Reentry & Housing (Atlanta)
description: Action Ministries (Action Pact) provides housing navigation, emergency assistance, and workforce supports for individuals and families experiencing homelessness and poverty in metro Atlanta including returning citizens seeking stable housing and employment after incarceration. Programs include transitional housing referrals, utility assistance, and job readiness—not a walk-in emergency shelter at all locations.
description_es: Action Ministries (Action Pact) ofrece navegación de vivienda, asistencia de emergencia y apoyos de fuerza laboral para personas y familias sin hogar y en pobreza en el metro de Atlanta, incluidos ciudadanos que regresan que buscan vivienda estable y empleo después de la encarcelación. Los programas incluyen referencias de vivienda transicional, asistencia de servicios públicos y preparación laboral.
eligibility: Low-income metro Atlanta residents including justice-involved individuals; program-specific requirements vary.
eligibility_es: Residentes de bajos ingresos del metro de Atlanta incluidas personas con antecedentes penales; los requisitos varían según el programa.
notes: Visit actionministries.net or call 404-881-1991 for program intake; multiple metro locations serve Fulton and surrounding counties.
notes_es: Visite actionministries.net o llame al 404-881-1991 para admisión; múltiples ubicaciones sirven Fulton y condados circundantes.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Housing navigation|Emergency assistance|Workforce supports|Transitional housing referrals|Utility assistance

name: Crossroads Community Ministries — Atlanta
description: Crossroads Community Ministries at the Atlanta Day Shelter provides meals, mail service, case management, and reentry resource navigation for unhoused adults in downtown Atlanta including returning citizens recently released from Fulton County Jail or state custody. Direct services at the day shelter—not overnight housing at this location.
description_es: Crossroads Community Ministries en el Refugio Diurno de Atlanta proporciona comidas, servicio de correo, manejo de casos y navegación de recursos de reinserción para adultos sin hogar en el centro de Atlanta, incluidos ciudadanos que regresan recién liberados de la cárcel del condado Fulton o custodia estatal. Servicios directos en el refugio diurno, no vivienda nocturna en esta ubicación.
eligibility: Unhoused adults in metro Atlanta; justice-involved individuals welcome for day services and navigation.
eligibility_es: Adultos sin hogar en el metro de Atlanta; personas con antecedentes penales bienvenidas para servicios diurnos.
notes: Day shelter services; call 404-681-5777 for hours; connects to housing and employment partners in Fulton County.
notes_es: Servicios de refugio diurno; llame al 404-681-5777; conecta con aliados de vivienda y empleo en el condado Fulton.
hours: Monday–Friday day shelter hours; call for schedule
services: Day shelter meals|Mail service|Case management|Reentry resource navigation|Hygiene access

name: Union Mission — Savannah Reentry Services
description: Union Mission in Savannah provides emergency shelter, transitional housing, behavioral health, and workforce development for individuals experiencing homelessness including justice-involved adults returning to Chatham County after incarceration. Staff coordinate with Georgia DCS, local courts, and employers on reentry plans. Direct services at Savannah campus—not a statewide hotline.
description_es: Union Mission en Savannah ofrece refugio de emergencia, vivienda transicional, salud conductual y desarrollo de fuerza laboral para personas sin hogar, incluidos adultos con antecedentes penales que regresan al condado Chatham después de la encarcelación. El personal coordina con DCS de Georgia, tribunales locales y empleadores en planes de reinserción.
eligibility: Adults experiencing homelessness or housing instability in Chatham County; justice-involved individuals accepted per program policy.
eligibility_es: Adultos sin hogar o con inestabilidad de vivienda en el condado Chatham; personas con antecedentes penales aceptadas según política del programa.
notes: Call 912-232-1979 for intake; multiple Savannah programs include shelter, recovery housing, and employment services.
notes_es: Llame al 912-232-1979 para admisión; múltiples programas en Savannah incluyen refugio, vivienda de recuperación y empleo.
hours: Contact for program hours
services: Emergency shelter|Transitional housing|Behavioral health|Workforce development|Reentry case management

name: Valley Rescue Mission — Columbus
description: Valley Rescue Mission in Columbus provides emergency shelter, recovery housing, meals, and life recovery programming for men and women experiencing homelessness including returning citizens released from Muscogee County Jail or nearby state prisons. Faith-based direct services with case management and workforce preparation—not a DCS referral-only program.
description_es: Valley Rescue Mission en Columbus ofrece refugio de emergencia, vivienda de recuperación, comidas y programación de recuperación de vida para hombres y mujeres sin hogar, incluidos ciudadanos que regresan liberados de la cárcel del condado Muscogee o prisiones estatales cercanas. Servicios directos con manejo de casos y preparación laboral.
eligibility: Adults experiencing homelessness in Columbus-Muscogee area; program-specific requirements for recovery housing.
eligibility_es: Adultos sin hogar en el área Columbus-Muscogee; requisitos específicos del programa para vivienda de recuperación.
notes: Call 706-327-3259 for intake; men's and women's programs available; connects to WorkSource Columbus career center.
notes_es: Llame al 706-327-3259 para admisión; programas para hombres y mujeres disponibles; conecta con WorkSource Columbus.
hours: Contact for intake hours
services: Emergency shelter|Recovery housing|Meals|Life recovery programming|Case management|Workforce preparation

name: Golden Harvest Food Bank — Augusta
description: Golden Harvest Food Bank serves the Central Savannah River Area with food pantry partnerships, mobile food distributions, and SNAP application assistance for low-income residents including returning citizens reestablishing food security in Richmond, Columbia, Burke, and surrounding counties. A regional food bank—not a walk-in emergency shelter.
description_es: Golden Harvest Food Bank sirve el Área Central del Río Savannah con alianzas de despensas de alimentos, distribuciones móviles y asistencia para solicitudes de SNAP para residentes de bajos ingresos, incluidos ciudadanos que regresan que restablecen seguridad alimentaria en Richmond, Columbia, Burke y condados circundantes.
eligibility: Low-income residents of CSRA counties; partner pantries may have additional requirements.
eligibility_es: Residentes de bajos ingresos de condados del CSRA; las despensas aliadas pueden tener requisitos adicionales.
notes: Find partner pantries at goldenharvest.org; call 706-736-1199; SNAP outreach available in service area.
notes_es: Encuentre despensas aliadas en goldenharvest.org; llame al 706-736-1199; alcance de SNAP disponible.
hours: Food bank Monday–Friday business hours; pantry hours vary
services: Food pantry network|Mobile food distribution|SNAP application assistance|Partner agency referrals|Nutrition programs

name: Macon-Bibb Economic Opportunity Council — Reentry
description: Macon-Bibb Economic Opportunity Council provides workforce development, emergency assistance, Head Start referrals, and community action programs for low-income Bibb County residents including justice-involved adults seeking employment and stability after release from local jail or state custody. A community action agency—not emergency overnight shelter.
description_es: Macon-Bibb Economic Opportunity Council ofrece desarrollo de fuerza laboral, asistencia de emergencia, referencias Head Start y programas de acción comunitaria para residentes de bajos ingresos del condado Bibb, incluidos adultos con antecedentes penales que buscan empleo y estabilidad después de la liberación.
eligibility: Low-income Macon-Bibb County residents; program-specific income guidelines apply.
eligibility_es: Residentes de bajos ingresos del condado Macon-Bibb; aplican pautas de ingresos específicas del programa.
notes: Call 478-745-0035 for intake; connects to WorkSource Macon and local reentry partners.
notes_es: Llame al 478-745-0035 para admisión; conecta con WorkSource Macon y aliados locales de reinserción.

services: Workforce development|Emergency assistance|Community action programs|Head Start referrals|Reentry partner navigation

name: Georgia Department of Community Supervision — Reentry Partnership Housing (RPH)
description: The Reentry Partnership Housing (RPH) Program is a statewide collaboration among the Georgia Department of Community Affairs, Department of Community Supervision, Department of Corrections, and Council of Accountability Court Judges. Certified providers offer short-term stable housing and food access for up to six months to parolees, probationers, and accountability court participants who lack valid residence plans at release. Returning citizens are referred through DCS field offices—not a walk-in shelter program.
description_es: El Programa de Vivienda de Asociación para la Reinserción (RPH) es una colaboración estatal entre el Departamento de Asuntos Comunitarios, Supervisión Comunitaria, Correcciones y el Consejo de Jueces de Tribunales de Responsabilidad de Georgia. Proveedores certificados ofrecen vivienda estable a corto plazo y acceso a alimentos hasta por seis meses a personas en libertad condicional, probatoria o tribunales de responsabilidad sin plan de residencia válido al salir. Los ciudadanos que regresan son referidos por oficinas de campo de DCS, no es un refugio sin cita.
address: 2 Martin Luther King Jr. Drive SE
eligibility: Individuals under DCS parole or probation supervision or active in felony drug, mental health, veterans, or family accountability courts who lack valid housing plans; referral required through DCS.
eligibility_es: Personas bajo supervisión de libertad condicional o probatoria de DCS o activas en tribunales de responsabilidad sin plan de vivienda válido; se requiere referencia de DCS.
notes: Contact RPH@dca.ga.gov or visit dca.georgia.gov RPH page; individuals must work with their DCS officer for placement.
notes_es: Contacte RPH@dca.ga.gov; las personas deben trabajar con su oficial de DCS para colocación.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Short-term reentry housing|Food access|Accountability court housing|DCS referral placement|Provider certification

name: Georgia Department of Community Supervision — Reentry Services
description: The Georgia Department of Community Supervision Reentry Services division coordinates statewide transition planning, housing programs including RPH, employment linkages, and community resource navigation for parolees and probationers. Field offices across Georgia connect returning citizens to local partners for identification, benefits, and supervision compliance. This is a coordination and referral office—not emergency cash or shelter intake.
description_es: La división de Servicios de Reinserción del Departamento de Supervisión Comunitaria de Georgia coordina planificación estatal de transición, programas de vivienda incluyendo RPH, vínculos laborales y navegación de recursos comunitarios para personas en libertad condicional y probatoria. Las oficinas de campo conectan a ciudadanos que regresan con aliados locales para identificación, beneficios y cumplimiento de supervisión. Es una oficina de coordinación y referencias.
address: 2 Martin Luther King Jr. Drive SE
eligibility: Adults under DCS parole or probation supervision in Georgia; services accessed through assigned community supervision officer.
eligibility_es: Adultos bajo supervisión de libertad condicional o probatoria de DCS en Georgia; servicios a través del oficial asignado.
notes: Visit dcs.georgia.gov/reentry-services; contact your assigned parole or probation officer for RPH and local reentry referrals.
notes_es: Visite dcs.georgia.gov/reentry-services; contacte a su oficial asignado para referencias RPH y de reinserción local.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Reentry planning coordination|RPH housing referrals|Employment linkages|Community resource navigation|Supervision compliance support

name: Georgia Vocational Rehabilitation Agency (GVRA)
description: The Georgia Vocational Rehabilitation Agency helps Georgians with disabilities prepare for, find, and keep employment through counseling, training, job placement, and employer partnerships at offices statewide. Justice-involved clients with qualifying disabilities can access vocational evaluation, assistive technology, and supported employment after release. Call the Customer Care unit or complete the online referral form to locate your nearest office.
description_es: La Agencia Vocacional de Rehabilitación de Georgia ayuda a georgianos con discapacidades a prepararse, encontrar y mantener empleo mediante consejería, capacitación, colocación laboral y alianzas con empleadores en oficinas de todo el estado. Clientes con antecedentes penales y discapacidades calificadas pueden acceder a evaluación vocacional y empleo apoyado después de la liberación.
eligibility: Georgia residents with physical, mental, or sensory disabilities that create a barrier to employment; justice-involved individuals with qualifying disabilities welcome.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Georgia con discapacidades que crean barrera al empleo; personas con antecedentes penales y discapacidades calificadas son bienvenidas.
notes: Call 844-367-4872 or visit gvs.georgia.gov to find the nearest of 27 VR offices; referral form available online.
notes_es: Llame al 844-367-4872 o visite gvs.georgia.gov para encontrar la oficina VR más cercana.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Vocational counseling|Job placement|Skills training|Assistive technology|Supported employment

name: Georgia CALLS — Reentry Employment Network
description: Georgia CALLS (Career Advancement and Life Skills) is a statewide network connecting justice-involved Georgians to fair-chance employment, job readiness training, and employer partners who hire returning citizens. The program works with community organizations, DCS, and local workforce boards to place participants in sustainable jobs across Georgia. A navigation and placement program—not emergency cash assistance.
description_es: Georgia CALLS es una red estatal que conecta a georgianos con antecedentes penales con empleo de segunda oportunidad, capacitación de preparación laboral y empleadores que contratan ciudadanos que regresan. El programa trabaja con organizaciones comunitarias, DCS y juntas locales de fuerza laboral para colocar participantes en empleos sostenibles en Georgia.
eligibility: Justice-involved Georgia residents seeking employment after incarceration or under community supervision; referral through partner agencies or workforce centers.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Georgia con antecedentes penales que buscan empleo; referencia a través de agencias aliadas o centros de fuerza laboral.
notes: Visit georgiacalls.org or contact a local WorkSource Georgia career center for intake and employer partner list.
notes_es: Visite georgiacalls.org o contacte un centro de carrera WorkSource Georgia local para admisión.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Fair-chance job placement|Job readiness training|Employer partnerships|Career navigation|Life skills coaching

name: Georgia Justice Project
description: Georgia Justice Project provides free legal representation and social support to low-income Georgians with criminal records seeking record restriction, employment barriers removal, and stability after incarceration. Staff attorneys handle expungement, pardons guidance, and civil legal issues tied to reentry while social workers connect clients to housing and employment. Serves clients statewide from Atlanta headquarters with satellite partnerships.
description_es: Georgia Justice Project ofrece representación legal gratuita y apoyo social a georgianos de bajos ingresos con antecedentes penales que buscan restricción de registros, eliminación de barreras laborales y estabilidad después de la encarcelación. Abogados manejan eliminación de antecedentes, orientación sobre indultos y asuntos legales civiles vinculados a la reinserción.
eligibility: Low-income Georgia residents with criminal records; income and case-type eligibility apply; contact for intake screening.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Georgia de bajos ingresos con antecedentes penales; aplican elegibilidad por ingresos y tipo de caso.
notes: Apply online at gjpc.org/get-help; bring court documents and ID to intake appointment.
notes_es: Solicite en línea en gjpc.org/get-help; traiga documentos judiciales e identificación a la cita.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Criminal record restriction|Expungement assistance|Pardons guidance|Civil legal aid|Social support services

name: Georgia Legal Services Program
description: Georgia Legal Services Program provides free civil legal aid to low-income Georgians outside metro Atlanta, including record restriction assistance, housing disputes, public benefits appeals, and family law matters affecting returning citizens. Regional offices serve rural and small-town counties with attorneys who understand reentry barriers. Not criminal defense—civil legal aid for stability after release.
description_es: Georgia Legal Services Program ofrece asistencia legal civil gratuita a georgianos de bajos ingresos fuera del área metropolitana de Atlanta, incluyendo restricción de registros, disputas de vivienda, apelaciones de beneficios públicos y asuntos de derecho familiar que afectan a ciudadanos que regresan. Oficinas regionales sirven condados rurales con abogados que entienden barreras de reinserción.
eligibility: Low-income Georgia residents outside Fulton, DeKalb, Clayton, Cobb, Gwinnett, and Henry counties; income limits apply.
eligibility_es: Residentes de bajos ingresos de Georgia fuera de Fulton, DeKalb, Clayton, Cobb, Gwinnett y Henry; aplican límites de ingresos.
notes: Call 1-800-498-5777 or visit glsp.org to find your regional office; Atlanta Legal Aid serves core metro counties.
notes_es: Llame al 1-800-498-5777 o visite glsp.org para encontrar su oficina regional.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Civil legal aid|Record restriction|Housing disputes|Public benefits appeals|Family law assistance

name: Georgia Department of Veterans Service
description: The Georgia Department of Veterans Service helps veterans and their families access VA benefits, healthcare enrollment, education benefits, and emergency assistance through field offices in every Georgia county. Justice-involved veterans can receive claims assistance, discharge upgrade guidance, and connections to veterans treatment courts and VA reentry programs. County veterans service officers provide free advocacy—not emergency shelter.
description_es: El Departamento de Servicios para Veteranos de Georgia ayuda a veteranos y sus familias a acceder a beneficios del VA, inscripción en atención médica, beneficios educativos y asistencia de emergencia a través de oficinas de campo en cada condado de Georgia. Veteranos con antecedentes penales pueden recibir asistencia con reclamaciones y conexiones a tribunales de tratamiento para veteranos.
address: 2 Martin Luther King Jr. Drive SE
eligibility: Georgia veterans, service members, and eligible dependents; justice-involved veterans welcome for benefits navigation.
eligibility_es: Veteranos de Georgia, miembros del servicio y dependientes elegibles; veteranos con antecedentes penales bienvenidos para navegación de beneficios.
notes: Find your county veterans service officer at veterans.georgia.gov; bring DD-214 and ID to appointments.
notes_es: Encuentre su oficial de servicios para veteranos del condado en veterans.georgia.gov; traiga DD-214 e identificación.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: VA benefits claims assistance|Healthcare enrollment|Education benefits navigation|Emergency veteran assistance|County VSO advocacy

name: Gateway Center Atlanta
description: Gateway Center is Atlanta's largest homeless services campus providing emergency shelter, case management, workforce development, and pathways to permanent housing for men and women experiencing homelessness including returning citizens. The multi-building campus on Pryor Road connects residents to employment, benefits, and behavioral health partners across metro Atlanta. Contact intake for bed availability and documentation requirements.
description_es: Gateway Center es el campus de servicios para personas sin hogar más grande de Atlanta con refugio de emergencia, manejo de casos, desarrollo de fuerza laboral y caminos hacia vivienda permanente para hombres y mujeres sin hogar, incluidos ciudadanos que regresan. El campus en Pryor Road conecta residentes con empleo, beneficios y aliados de salud conductual en el área metropolitana de Atlanta.
eligibility: Adults experiencing homelessness in metro Atlanta; justice-involved individuals accepted per program policy; contact for intake.
eligibility_es: Adultos sin hogar en el área metropolitana de Atlanta; personas con antecedentes penales aceptadas según política; contacte para admisión.
notes: Call 404-215-6600 for intake; bring ID; multiple programs on campus including workforce and housing navigation.
notes_es: Llame al 404-215-6600 para admisión; traiga identificación; múltiples programas en el campus.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Emergency shelter|Case management|Workforce development|Housing navigation|Behavioral health referrals

name: Atlanta Mission — The Shepherd's Inn (Men)
description: Atlanta Mission operates The Shepherd's Inn, providing emergency shelter, addiction recovery programming, life skills, and discipleship-based reentry support for men experiencing homelessness in Atlanta including returning citizens without stable housing after incarceration. The campus includes meals, chapel services, and connections to transitional housing and employment partners. Call ahead to confirm intake hours and bed availability.
description_es: Atlanta Mission opera The Shepherd's Inn con refugio de emergencia, programación de recuperación de adicciones, habilidades para la vida y apoyo de reinserción basado en discipulado para hombres sin hogar en Atlanta, incluidos ciudadanos que regresan sin vivienda estable después de la encarcelación. El campus incluye comidas y conexiones con aliados de vivienda transicional y empleo.
eligibility: Men experiencing homelessness in Atlanta; justice-involved men often accepted; recovery programming available.
eligibility_es: Hombres sin hogar en Atlanta; hombres con antecedentes penales a menudo aceptados; programación de recuperación disponible.
notes: Men's campus on Bolton Road; My Sister's House serves women at separate location; call for intake schedule.
notes_es: Campus de hombres en Bolton Road; My Sister's House sirve mujeres en ubicación separada; llame para horario de admisión.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Men's emergency shelter|Addiction recovery|Life skills|Transitional housing referrals|Meals

name: Atlanta Mission — My Sister's House (Women)
description: My Sister's House is Atlanta Mission's campus for women and women with children experiencing homelessness, offering emergency shelter, recovery programming, and family stabilization for justice-involved women reuniting with children after release. Case managers connect residents to employment, childcare, and permanent housing resources across Fulton and DeKalb counties. Contact for gender-specific intake requirements.
description_es: My Sister's House es el campus de Atlanta Mission para mujeres y mujeres con niños sin hogar, ofreciendo refugio de emergencia, programación de recuperación y estabilización familiar para mujeres con antecedentes penales que se reúnen con hijos después de la liberación. Los administradores de casos conectan residentes con empleo, cuidado infantil y vivienda permanente en Fulton y DeKalb.
eligibility: Women and women with children experiencing homelessness; justice-involved women welcome per program policy.
eligibility_es: Mujeres y mujeres con niños sin hogar; mujeres con antecedentes penales bienvenidas según política del programa.
notes: Women's campus separate from Shepherd's Inn; call 404-588-8431 for intake and family bed availability.
notes_es: Campus de mujeres separado de Shepherd's Inn; llame al 404-588-8431 para admisión y disponibilidad familiar.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Women's emergency shelter|Family stabilization|Recovery programming|Childcare referrals|Housing navigation

name: City of Refuge — Transitional Housing
description: City of Refuge provides transitional housing, workforce training, and wraparound support for homeless and at-risk families and individuals in Atlanta's Westside including returning citizens rebuilding stability after incarceration. The campus includes culinary training, childcare, and connections to permanent housing and fair-chance employers. Referral or application required for most residential programs.
description_es: City of Refuge ofrece vivienda transicional, capacitación laboral y apoyo integral para familias e individuos sin hogar o en riesgo en el Westside de Atlanta, incluidos ciudadanos que regresan que reconstruyen estabilidad después de la encarcelación. El campus incluye capacitación culinaria, cuidado infantil y conexiones con vivienda permanente y empleadores de segunda oportunidad.
eligibility: Homeless and at-risk individuals and families in Atlanta; justice-involved residents accepted per program track.
eligibility_es: Individuos y familias sin hogar o en riesgo en Atlanta; residentes con antecedentes penales aceptados según vía del programa.
notes: Apply through cityofrefugeatl.org; culinary and workforce programs on campus; limited bed availability.
notes_es: Solicite a través de cityofrefugeatl.org; programas culinarios y laborales en el campus.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Transitional housing|Workforce training|Childcare|Culinary training|Permanent housing referrals

name: HOPE Atlanta — Reentry Housing Navigation
description: HOPE Atlanta provides street outreach, emergency shelter referrals, rapid rehousing, and permanent supportive housing navigation for people experiencing homelessness across metro Atlanta including returning citizens barred from traditional housing due to criminal records. Coordinated Entry partners connect clients to shelter beds, rental assistance, and case management in Fulton, DeKalb, and Cobb counties.
description_es: HOPE Atlanta ofrece alcance en la calle, referencias de refugio de emergencia, realojamiento rápido y navegación de vivienda de apoyo permanente para personas sin hogar en el área metropolitana de Atlanta, incluidos ciudadanos que regresan excluidos por antecedentes penales. Los aliados de Entrada Coordinada conectan clientes con camas de refugio, asistencia de alquiler y manejo de casos en Fulton, DeKalb y Cobb.
eligibility: Homeless or at-risk adults in metro Atlanta; justice-involved individuals eligible for rehousing programs.
eligibility_es: Adultos sin hogar o en riesgo en el área metropolitana de Atlanta; personas con antecedentes penales elegibles para programas de realojamiento.
notes: Coordinated Entry access point for some metro programs; call 404-817-7070 for housing assessment.
notes_es: Punto de acceso de Entrada Coordinada para algunos programas metropolitanos; llame al 404-817-7070.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Street outreach|Rapid rehousing|Supportive housing navigation|Emergency shelter referrals|Rental assistance

name: Nicholas House — Family Shelter & Rehousing
description: Nicholas House operates family emergency shelter and rapid rehousing programs in DeKalb County for parents with children experiencing homelessness including justice-involved parents reuniting with children after incarceration. Case managers provide employment coaching, budgeting, and connections to permanent housing and childcare resources. Application and referral required for shelter beds.
description_es: Nicholas House opera refugio de emergencia familiar y programas de realojamiento rápido en el condado DeKalb para padres con niños sin hogar, incluidos padres con antecedentes penales que se reúnen con hijos después de la encarcelación. Los administradores de casos ofrecen coaching de empleo, presupuesto y conexiones con vivienda permanente y cuidado infantil.
eligibility: Families with children experiencing homelessness in DeKalb County; justice-involved parents may qualify.
eligibility_es: Familias con niños sin hogar en el condado DeKalb; padres con antecedentes penales pueden calificar.
notes: Family-focused shelter in DeKalb; apply through nicholashouse.org intake form.
notes_es: Refugio enfocado en familias en DeKalb; solicite a través del formulario de admisión de nicholashouse.org.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Family emergency shelter|Rapid rehousing|Employment coaching|Budgeting support|Childcare referrals

name: Mary Hall Freedom House — Women's Recovery Housing
description: Mary Hall Freedom House provides long-term recovery residence and supportive housing for women overcoming substance use disorders and homelessness in Atlanta including justice-involved women referred from drug courts and accountability courts. The program combines counseling, life skills, parenting support, and employment preparation on a structured campus. Referral from treatment provider or court often required.
description_es: Mary Hall Freedom House ofrece residencia de recuperación a largo plazo y vivienda de apoyo para mujeres que superan trastornos por uso de sustancias y falta de vivienda en Atlanta, incluidas mujeres con antecedentes penales referidas por tribunales de drogas y de responsabilidad. El programa combina consejería, habilidades para la vida, apoyo parental y preparación laboral.
eligibility: Women in recovery from substance use disorders; referrals from courts, treatment providers, or DCS often required.
eligibility_es: Mujeres en recuperación de trastornos por uso de sustancias; referencias de tribunales, proveedores de tratamiento o DCS a menudo requeridas.
notes: Long-term recovery residence—not emergency walk-in; contact for referral process and bed availability.
notes_es: Residencia de recuperación a largo plazo, no admisión de emergencia sin cita; contacte para referencia.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Recovery residence|Supportive housing|Counseling|Parenting support|Employment preparation

name: Phoenix Pass — Women's Recovery Residence
description: Phoenix Pass provides structured sober living and recovery housing for women in Cobb County including justice-involved women transitioning from incarceration or treatment to independent living. Residents receive case management, 12-step support, employment coaching, and connections to Cobb County workforce and healthcare resources. Application and sobriety requirements apply.
description_es: Phoenix Pass ofrece vida sobria estructurada y vivienda de recuperación para mujeres en el condado Cobb, incluidas mujeres con antecedentes penales en transición de la encarcelación o tratamiento a vida independiente. Las residentes reciben manejo de casos, apoyo de 12 pasos, coaching de empleo y conexiones con recursos laborales y de salud del condado Cobb.
eligibility: Women in recovery seeking structured sober living in Cobb County; background check and sobriety requirements.
eligibility_es: Mujeres en recuperación que buscan vida sobria estructurada en Cobb; verificación de antecedentes y requisitos de sobriedad.
notes: Apply at phoenixpass.org; not emergency shelter; minimum sobriety period required for admission.
notes_es: Solicite en phoenixpass.org; no es refugio de emergencia; se requiere período mínimo de sobriedad.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Sober living|Recovery housing|Case management|12-step support|Employment coaching

name: LiveSafe Resources — Emergency Shelter (Cobb)
description: LiveSafe Resources operates Cobb County's primary domestic violence and homeless services hub including emergency shelter, rapid rehousing, and supportive services for individuals and families including justice-involved survivors rebuilding safety after release. Advocates provide legal referrals, safety planning, and connections to employment and childcare. Call the 24-hour hotline for crisis intake.
description_es: LiveSafe Resources opera el centro principal de servicios de violencia doméstica y personas sin hogar del condado Cobb incluyendo refugio de emergencia, realojamiento rápido y servicios de apoyo para individuos y familias, incluidos sobrevivientes con antecedentes penales que reconstruyen seguridad después de la liberación. Los defensores ofrecen referencias legales, planificación de seguridad y conexiones laborales.
eligibility: Cobb County residents experiencing domestic violence or homelessness; justice-involved survivors eligible.
eligibility_es: Residentes del condado Cobb que experimentan violencia doméstica o falta de vivienda; sobrevivientes con antecedentes penales elegibles.
notes: 24-hour hotline 770-427-3390; not all beds available walk-in; safety planning for DV survivors.
notes_es: Línea directa 24 horas 770-427-3390; no todas las camas disponibles sin cita.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Emergency shelter|Rapid rehousing|Safety planning|Legal referrals|Supportive services

name: ReStart Atlanta — Men's Transitional Housing
description: ReStart Atlanta provides faith-based transitional housing and life recovery programming for men experiencing homelessness and addiction in Atlanta including returning citizens seeking structured reentry support. Residents participate in work therapy, counseling, and job readiness while preparing for independent housing and employment. Contact for intake interview and program requirements.
description_es: ReStart Atlanta ofrece vivienda transicional basada en la fe y programación de recuperación de vida para hombres sin hogar y con adicción en Atlanta, incluidos ciudadanos que regresan que buscan apoyo estructurado de reinserción. Los residentes participan en terapia laboral, consejería y preparación laboral mientras se preparan para vivienda independiente y empleo.
eligibility: Men experiencing homelessness or addiction in Atlanta; justice-involved men accepted per program policy.
eligibility_es: Hombres sin hogar o con adicción en Atlanta; hombres con antecedentes penales aceptados según política.
notes: Faith-based transitional program; work therapy component; call for intake interview.

services: Transitional housing|Life recovery|Work therapy|Counseling|Job readiness

name: First Step Staffing — Atlanta
description: First Step Staffing is a nonprofit staffing agency specializing in fair-chance employment for homeless and justice-involved adults in Atlanta, placing returning citizens in temporary and permanent jobs with employer partners who hire regardless of criminal record. Case managers provide job coaching, transportation assistance, and retention support. Walk-in orientation available at Atlanta office.
description_es: First Step Staffing es una agencia de personal sin fines de lucro especializada en empleo de segunda oportunidad para adultos sin hogar y con antecedentes penales en Atlanta, colocando ciudadanos que regresan en empleos temporales y permanentes con empleadores que contratan sin importar antecedentes penales. Los administradores de casos ofrecen coaching laboral, asistencia de transporte y apoyo de retención.
eligibility: Homeless or justice-involved adults in Atlanta seeking employment; fair-chance hiring regardless of criminal record.
eligibility_es: Adultos sin hogar o con antecedentes penales en Atlanta que buscan empleo; contratación de segunda oportunidad sin importar antecedentes penales.
notes: Walk-in orientation at Atlanta office; also operates in DeKalb and other metro locations.
notes_es: Orientación sin cita en la oficina de Atlanta; también opera en DeKalb y otras ubicaciones metropolitanas.

services: Fair-chance job placement|Temporary staffing|Job coaching|Transportation assistance|Retention support

name: Goodwill of North Georgia — Career Centers
description: Goodwill of North Georgia operates career centers across 45 north Georgia counties providing job training, certifications, career coaching, and fair-chance employment services for justice-involved job seekers. The Atlanta career center connects returning citizens to in-demand credentials, employer partners, and supportive services including transportation and work clothing. Not emergency cash—a workforce development provider.
description_es: Goodwill del Norte de Georgia opera centros de carrera en 45 condados del norte de Georgia con capacitación laboral, certificaciones, coaching de carrera y servicios de empleo de segunda oportunidad para buscadores de empleo con antecedentes penales. El centro de carrera de Atlanta conecta ciudadanos que regresan con credenciales demandadas, empleadores aliados y servicios de apoyo.
eligibility: Job seekers in Goodwill service area including justice-involved adults; program-specific requirements vary.
eligibility_es: Buscadores de empleo en el área de servicio de Goodwill incluidos adultos con antecedentes penales; los requisitos varían según el programa.
notes: Multiple career center locations; visit goodwillng.org/locations for nearest center.
notes_es: Múltiples ubicaciones de centros de carrera; visite goodwillng.org/locations para el centro más cercano.

services: Job training|Career coaching|Certifications|Fair-chance employment|Work clothing assistance

name: WorkSource Metro Atlanta — Career Resource Centers
description: WorkSource Metro Atlanta serves the 10-county metro region with WIOA-funded career training, job search assistance, and employment navigation for job seekers including justice-involved adults through American Job Center partners. Participants can access training funds, child care support, and transportation assistance for in-demand occupations. Select your county at atlworks.org to find your local career resource center.
description_es: WorkSource Metro Atlanta sirve la región metropolitana de 10 condados con capacitación de carrera financiada por WIOA, asistencia de búsqueda de empleo y navegación laboral para buscadores de empleo incluidos adultos con antecedentes penales. Los participantes pueden acceder a fondos de capacitación, apoyo de cuidado infantil y asistencia de transporte para ocupaciones demandadas.
eligibility: Metro Atlanta residents seeking employment or training; WIOA eligibility requirements apply; justice-involved adults welcome.
eligibility_es: Residentes del área metropolitana de Atlanta que buscan empleo o capacitación; aplican requisitos de elegibilidad WIOA; adultos con antecedentes penales bienvenidos.
notes: Visit atlworks.org to select county and begin WIOA application; connects to Georgia CALLS fair-chance employers.
notes_es: Visite atlworks.org para seleccionar condado e iniciar solicitud WIOA; conecta con empleadores Georgia CALLS.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: WIOA career training|Job search assistance|Child care support|Transportation assistance|Fair-chance employment navigation

name: Mercy Care — FQHC Atlanta
description: Mercy Care is a Federally Qualified Health Center serving homeless and low-income residents across metro Atlanta with primary care, behavioral health, dental, pharmacy, and substance use treatment on a sliding fee scale. Justice-involved returning citizens can establish a medical home, access MAT, and receive integrated behavioral health counseling at multiple Atlanta clinic sites. Not a hospital emergency department.
description_es: Mercy Care es un Centro de Salud Calificado Federal que sirve a residentes sin hogar y de bajos ingresos en el área metropolitana de Atlanta con atención primaria, salud conductual, dental, farmacia y tratamiento de uso de sustancias con tarifa escalonada. Ciudadanos que regresan pueden establecer un hogar médico, acceder a TMO y recibir consejería conductual integrada en múltiples clínicas de Atlanta.
eligibility: Homeless and low-income metro Atlanta residents; sliding fee scale; justice-involved adults accepted for primary and behavioral health.
eligibility_es: Residentes sin hogar y de bajos ingresos del área metropolitana de Atlanta; tarifa escalonada; adultos con antecedentes penales aceptados.
notes: Multiple clinic sites including downtown and south Atlanta; call 404-881-0070 for nearest location.
notes_es: Múltiples clínicas incluyendo centro y sur de Atlanta; llame al 404-881-0070 para la ubicación más cercana.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Primary care|Behavioral health counseling|Dental care|Medication-assisted treatment|Sliding fee scale|Pharmacy

name: Grady Health System — Reentry Health Services
description: Grady Health System is Atlanta's safety-net hospital providing emergency, inpatient, and outpatient care including behavioral health and addiction medicine for uninsured and Medicaid patients in Fulton County. Justice-involved returning citizens can access psychiatric emergency services, primary care clinics, and specialty referrals through Grady's community health network. Emergency department for crises; clinics for ongoing care.
description_es: Grady Health System es el hospital de red de seguridad de Atlanta que ofrece atención de emergencia, hospitalaria y ambulatoria incluyendo salud conductual y medicina de adicciones para pacientes sin seguro y Medicaid en el condado Fulton. Ciudadanos que regresan pueden acceder a servicios psiquiátricos de emergencia, clínicas de atención primaria y referencias especializadas.
eligibility: All patients regardless of ability to pay; financial assistance available; justice-involved adults accepted for all services.
eligibility_es: Todos los pacientes sin importar capacidad de pago; asistencia financiera disponible; adultos con antecedentes penales aceptados.
notes: Psychiatric emergency at Grady Memorial; primary care at neighborhood health centers; bring ID and insurance if available.
notes_es: Emergencia psiquiátrica en Grady Memorial; atención primaria en centros de salud del barrio; traiga identificación.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Emergency care|Psychiatric emergency|Primary care clinics|Addiction medicine|Financial assistance

name: St. Jude's Recovery Center — Atlanta
description: St. Jude's Recovery Center provides residential and outpatient substance use disorder treatment for men and women in Atlanta including justice-involved clients referred from courts, DCS, and community corrections. The program offers detox referrals, counseling, 12-step programming, and connections to RPH housing and employment partners. Medicaid and sliding fee accepted; call for intake assessment.
description_es: St. Jude's Recovery Center ofrece tratamiento residencial y ambulatorio de trastornos por uso de sustancias para hombres y mujeres en Atlanta, incluidos clientes con antecedentes penales referidos por tribunales, DCS y correcciones comunitarias. El programa ofrece referencias de desintoxicación, consejería, programación de 12 pasos y conexiones con vivienda RPH y empleo.
eligibility: Adults with substance use disorders in Atlanta; justice-involved clients welcome; Medicaid and sliding fee accepted.
eligibility_es: Adultos con trastornos por uso de sustancias en Atlanta; clientes con antecedentes penales bienvenidos; Medicaid y tarifa escalonada aceptados.
notes: Residential and outpatient tracks; court and DCS referrals accepted; call for bed availability.
notes_es: Vías residenciales y ambulatorias; referencias de tribunales y DCS aceptadas; llame para disponibilidad.
hours: Contact for current hours
services: Residential treatment|Outpatient counseling|12-step programming|Court referrals|Detox referrals

description: Anchor Hospital provides inpatient psychiatric and substance use disorder treatment, detoxification, and partial hospitalization for adults in metro Atlanta including justice-involved patients in behavioral health crisis or needing structured SUD treatment after release. Accepts Medicaid, Medicare, and commercial insurance. Not a walk-in primary care clinic—call for admission assessment.
description_es: Anchor Hospital ofrece tratamiento psiquiátrico hospitalario y de trastornos por uso de sustancias, desintoxicación y hospitalización parcial para adultos en el área metropolitana de Atlanta, incluidos pacientes con antecedentes penales en crisis de salud conductual. Acepta Medicaid, Medicare y seguros comerciales.

name: Atlanta Technical College — Adult Education & GED
description: Atlanta Technical College provides adult education, GED preparation, English language instruction, and workforce certifications for Fulton County residents including returning citizens seeking credentials for fair-chance employment. Free GED classes and testing assistance available through state adult education funding. Enrollment open year-round at main campus and satellite locations.

Clases GED gratuitas y asistencia para exámenes disponibles.

name: Atlanta VA Health Care System
description: The Atlanta VA Health Care System provides comprehensive medical, mental health, and substance use treatment for enrolled veterans in metro Atlanta and north Georgia including justice-involved veterans eligible for VA healthcare. Services include primary care, PTSD treatment, veterans justice outreach, and supported employment through VA vocational rehabilitation. Enroll at va.gov or call for eligibility screening.

Servicios incluyen atención primaria, tratamiento de TEPT y alcance de justicia para veteranos.
eligibility: Enrolled veterans with honorable or general discharge; justice-involved veterans may qualify; call for eligibility screening.
eligibility_es: Veteranos inscritos con baja honorable o general; veteranos con antecedentes penales pueden calificar; llame para evaluación de elegibilidad.

The Marietta campus includes a food pantry, clothing closet, and connections to housing and employment partners. Walk-in hours vary by service—call ahead. This resource supports Georgians navigating reentry in Cobb County.

name: Georgia Council on Substance Abuse — Peer Support
description: The Georgia Council on Substance Abuse trains and certifies peer recovery specialists and operates the CARES warm line connecting Georgians in recovery—including justice-involved individuals—to certified peer support, recovery resources, and treatment navigation statewide. Peers with lived experience provide non-clinical support for maintaining sobriety after release. Call or text the warm line—not a crisis emergency line.

name: MARTA — Reduced Fare Program
description: Metropolitan Atlanta Rapid Transit Authority (MARTA) provides bus and rail transit across Fulton and DeKalb counties with reduced fare programs for seniors, disabled riders, and low-income residents including returning citizens needing affordable transportation to work, appointments, and supervision reporting. Breeze cards available at stations and online. Not a paratransit referral service—apply for reduced fare at MARTA headquarters.

notes: Apply for reduced fare at MARTA HQ or online; Breeze card required for all rides.

Staff coordinate with Georgia CALLS employer partners and local GVRA offices for disability employment supports. Visit the career center in Americus or call for intake—not emergency cash assistance.

Visite el centro de carrera en Americus o llame para admisión.

name: South Central Primary Care — FQHC Network
description: South Central Primary Care is a Federally Qualified Health Center network providing primary care, behavioral health, dental, and pharmacy on a sliding fee scale across east-central Georgia rural counties. Justice-involved returning citizens can establish medical homes, access behavioral health counseling, and receive MAT referrals after release—not a walk-in crisis line.
description_es: South Central Primary Care is a Centro de Salud Calificado Federal (FQHC) network providing atención primaria, salud conductual, dental, and pharmacy on a tarifa escalonada across east-central Georgia rural counties. Ciudadanos que regresan pueden establecer hogares médicos, acceder a consejería conductual y recibir referencias de TMO después de la liberación.
eligibility: Open to residents in served counties; sliding fee scale; justice-involved adults accepted for primary and behavioral health.
eligibility_es: Abierto a residentes en condados servidos; tarifa escalonada; adultos con antecedentes penales aceptados.

name: Food Bank of Northeast Georgia
description: Food Bank of Northeast Georgia distributes food through a network of partner pantries and mobile distributions across 21 northeast Georgia counties including rural mountain and Piedmont communities where returning citizens often face food insecurity after release. Partner agencies in Clarke, Hall, Habersham, and surrounding counties provide groceries, fresh produce, and SNAP application assistance. Use foodbanknega.org pantry locator to find distribution sites in your county—not a walk-in client warehouse.
description_es: Food Bank of Northeast Georgia distribuye alimentos a través de una red de despensas aliadas y distribuciones móviles en 21 condados del noreste de Georgia, incluidas comunidades rurales de montaña y Piedmont donde los ciudadanos que regresan a menudo enfrentan inseguridad alimentaria después de la liberación. Las agencias aliadas en Clarke, Hall, Habersham y condados circundantes ofrecen comestibles, productos frescos y asistencia para solicitar SNAP. Use el localizador de despensas en foodbanknega.org.
eligibility: Low-income residents in served counties; access through partner pantries; no criminal record barrier.
eligibility_es: Residentes de bajos ingresos en condados servidos; acceso a través de despensas aliadas; sin barrera por antecedentes penales.
notes: Served counties: Banks, Barrow, Clarke, Elbert, Franklin, Greene, Habersham, Hall, Hart, Jackson, Lumpkin, Madison, Morgan, Oconee, Oglethorpe, Rabun, Stephens, Towns, Union, White, Wilkes; partner pantry locator on website.

name: Georgia Department of Education — Adult Education & GED
description: The Georgia Department of Education Adult Education Program connects adults including returning citizens to GED and HiSET preparation, adult diploma programs, and English literacy classes at local adult education sites in every region of Georgia. Justice-involved Georgians can rebuild credentials for employment and training programs through free or low-cost instruction at technical colleges and community partners. A statewide navigation resource—not a walk-in classroom at the state office.
