description: Georgia Council on Substance Abuse operates the CARES Warm Line providing peer support from certified peer specialists to Georgians in recovery including justice-involved individuals navigating substance use recovery after release. Trained peers offer non-crisis support, resource navigation, and connection to recovery meetings statewide. For crisis call GCAL 800-715-4225 or 988—not a substitute for emergency services.
description_es: Georgia Council on Substance Abuse opera la Línea de Apoyo CARES que proporciona apoyo entre pares de especialistas certificados a georgianos en recuperación incluidas personas con antecedentes penales que navegan recuperación de uso de sustancias después de la liberación. Para crisis llame a GCAL 800-715-4225 o 988.
eligibility: Open to Georgians in recovery from substance use including justice-involved individuals; non-crisis warm line.
eligibility_es: Abierto a georgianos en recuperación de uso de sustancias incluidas personas con antecedentes penales; línea de apoyo no crisis.
notes: Call or text 844-326-5525; peer specialists available; also see gasupport.org for recovery community resources.
notes_es: Llame o envíe texto al 844-326-5525; especialistas entre pares disponibles; vea gasupport.org para recursos comunitarios de recuperación.
hours: Published warm line hours; check gasupport.org
services: Peer recovery support|Resource navigation|Recovery meeting connections|Non-crisis counseling

name: Georgia Department of Behavioral Health — Opioid Crisis Helpline
description: The Georgia Department of Behavioral Health and Developmental Disabilities supports statewide substance use disorder treatment access through the Opioid Crisis Helpline and provider network navigation for Georgians including justice-involved individuals seeking MAT and recovery services after release. DBHDD coordinates publicly funded behavioral health services through regional providers. For crisis call GCAL 800-715-4225.
description_es: El Departamento de Salud Conductual y Desarrollo de Georgia apoya el acceso estatal al tratamiento de trastornos por uso de sustancias a través de la Línea de Crisis de Opioides y navegación de red de proveedores para georgianos incluidas personas con antecedentes penales que buscan TMO después de la liberación. Para crisis llame a GCAL 800-715-4225.
eligibility: Georgia residents seeking substance use treatment information and referrals; provider admission rules vary.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Georgia que buscan información y referencias de tratamiento de uso de sustancias; las reglas de admisión varían.
notes: Opioid Crisis Helpline 888-901-0029; find providers at dbhdd.georgia.gov; GCAL for behavioral health crisis.
notes_es: Línea de Crisis de Opioides 888-901-0029; encuentre proveedores en dbhdd.georgia.gov; GCAL para crisis de salud conductual.
hours: Helpline hours vary; GCAL 24/7
services: Treatment provider navigation|Opioid crisis helpline|Public behavioral health referrals|MAT program information

name: Georgia Department of Community Affairs — Housing Resources
description: The Georgia Department of Community Affairs administers affordable housing programs, homeless services grants, and the Reentry Partnership Housing (RPH) initiative connecting returning citizens to short-term stable housing through certified providers. DCA housing navigators help justice-involved Georgians locate rental assistance and transitional housing resources—not emergency shelter intake.
description_es: El Departamento de Asuntos Comunitarios de Georgia administra programas de vivienda asequible, subvenciones de servicios para personas sin hogar y la iniciativa de Vivienda de Asociación para la Reinserción (RPH) que conecta a ciudadanos que regresan con vivienda estable a corto plazo. Navegadores de vivienda DCA ayudan a georgianos con antecedentes penales a localizar asistencia de alquiler.
eligibility: Georgia residents seeking affordable housing or RPH referral through DCS; program-specific requirements apply.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Georgia que buscan vivienda asequible o referencia RPH a través de DCS; aplican requisitos específicos del programa.
notes: Visit dca.ga.gov for housing search and RPH information; RPH requires DCS officer referral.
notes_es: Visite dca.ga.gov para búsqueda de vivienda e información RPH; RPH requiere referencia del oficial de DCS.
hours: State office Monday–Friday business hours
services: Affordable housing locator|RPH program information|Homeless services grants|Housing navigation

name: Augusta VA Medical Center — Veterans Justice Outreach
description: Augusta VA Medical Center Veterans Justice Outreach specialist connects justice-involved veterans in the CSRA to VA health care, benefits, housing, and treatment court supports after release from Richmond County Jail or state custody. VJO staff coordinate with GA Department of Veterans Service and local courts on veteran reentry plans. VA enrollment required for medical services.
description_es: El especialista de Veterans Justice Outreach del Centro Médico VA de Augusta conecta a veteranos con antecedentes penales en el CSRA con atención médica del VA, beneficios, vivienda y apoyos de tribunales de tratamiento después de la liberación. El personal VJO coordina con el Departamento de Servicios para Veteranos de Georgia.
eligibility: Justice-involved veterans with qualifying military service; VA eligibility determination required.
eligibility_es: Veteranos con antecedentes penales con servicio militar calificado; se requiere determinación de elegibilidad del VA.
notes: Contact VJO through Augusta VA; also call Georgia Department of Veterans Service county office for claims help.
notes_es: Contacte VJO a través del VA de Augusta; también llame a la oficina del condado del Departamento de Servicios para Veteranos de Georgia.
hours: VA business hours; call for VJO appointment
services: Veterans Justice Outreach|VA health care enrollment|Benefits navigation|Treatment court coordination|Housing referrals

name: Dublin VA Medical Center — Veterans Justice Outreach
description: Dublin VA Medical Center Veterans Justice Outreach serves justice-involved veterans in central and south Georgia including those released from Macon-Bibb County facilities and state prisons in the region. VJO specialists link veterans to VA mental health, substance use treatment, and housing resources as part of veteran treatment court and reentry partnerships.
description_es: Veterans Justice Outreach del Centro Médico VA de Dublin sirve a veteranos con antecedentes penales en el centro y sur de Georgia incluidos los liberados de instalaciones del condado Macon-Bibb y prisiones estatales de la región. Especialistas VJO vinculan a veteranos con salud mental del VA, tratamiento de uso de sustancias y recursos de vivienda.
eligibility: Justice-involved veterans in central/south Georgia with qualifying military service.
eligibility_es: Veteranos con antecedentes penales en el centro/sur de Georgia con servicio militar calificado.
notes: Call Dublin VA for VJO referral; coordinates with Georgia DVS county offices.
notes_es: Llame al VA de Dublin para referencia VJO; coordina con oficinas del condado DVS de Georgia.
hours: VA business hours
services: Veterans Justice Outreach|VA mental health referrals|Substance use treatment|Housing navigation|Treatment court support

name: Trinka Davis Veterans Village — Transitional Housing
description: Trinka Davis Veterans Village provides transitional housing and supportive services for homeless and at-risk veterans including justice-involved veterans rebuilding stability in west Georgia. On-site case management, benefits assistance, and employment supports help participants transition to permanent housing. VA and community partner referrals required for admission.
description_es: Trinka Davis Veterans Village ofrece vivienda transicional y servicios de apoyo para veteranos sin hogar y en riesgo incluidos veteranos con antecedentes penales que reconstruyen estabilidad en el oeste de Georgia. Manejo de casos en el sitio, asistencia de beneficios y apoyos de empleo ayudan a participantes a transicionar a vivienda permanente.
eligibility: Homeless or at-risk veterans including justice-involved veterans; referral through VA or community partners typically required.
eligibility_es: Veteranos sin hogar o en riesgo incluidos veteranos con antecedentes penales; referencia a través del VA o aliados comunitarios generalmente requerida.
notes: Call 770-832-7860 for intake information; partners with Atlanta VA and Georgia DVS.
notes_es: Llame al 770-832-7860 para información de admisión; aliados con VA de Atlanta y DVS de Georgia.
hours: Contact for program hours
services: Transitional veteran housing|Case management|Benefits assistance|Employment supports|Permanent housing transition

name: Georgia Veterans Education Career Transition Resource (VECTR)
description: Georgia VECTR centers help veterans including justice-involved veterans translate military experience to civilian careers through skills assessment, training referrals, and employer connections at locations affiliated with technical colleges statewide. VECTR staff coordinate with GVRA and WorkSource Georgia on employment supports for veterans with barriers including criminal records.
description_es: Los centros VECTR de Georgia ayudan a veteranos incluidos veteranos con antecedentes penales a traducir experiencia militar a carreras civiles mediante evaluación de habilidades, referencias de capacitación y conexiones con empleadores en ubicaciones afiliadas a colegios técnicos en todo el estado.
eligibility: Georgia veterans with honorable or qualifying discharge seeking civilian employment or training.
eligibility_es: Veteranos de Georgia con baja honorable o calificada que buscan empleo o capacitación civil.
notes: Find VECTR locations at tcsg.edu/vectr; coordinates with Georgia DVS and WorkSource career centers.
notes_es: Encuentre ubicaciones VECTR en tcsg.edu/vectr; coordina con DVS de Georgia y centros de carrera WorkSource.
hours: Center hours vary by location
services: Military skills translation|Career assessment|Training referrals|Employer connections|WorkSource coordination

name: Veterans Court Program — Georgia Accountability Courts
description: Georgia's Veterans Court Program through the Accountability Court system provides treatment-oriented supervision alternatives for justice-involved veterans with substance use or mental health needs, combining court oversight with VA services, peer support, and housing referrals. Eligible veterans in participating counties access structured reentry supports instead of traditional incarceration. Referral through court system—not walk-in enrollment.
description_es: El Programa de Tribunales para Veteranos de Georgia a través del sistema de Tribunales de Responsabilidad ofrece alternativas de supervisión orientadas al tratamiento para veteranos con antecedentes penales con necesidades de salud mental o uso de sustancias, combinando supervisión judicial con servicios del VA y apoyo entre pares.
eligibility: Justice-involved veterans in participating Georgia counties meeting veterans court eligibility criteria; court referral required.
eligibility_es: Veteranos con antecedentes penales en condados participantes de Georgia que cumplan criterios de elegibilidad; se requiere referencia judicial.
notes: Participation varies by county; contact local accountability court or Georgia CJCC for participating jurisdictions.
notes_es: La participación varía por condado; contacte el tribunal de responsabilidad local o Georgia CJCC para jurisdicciones participantes.
hours: Court schedules vary
services: Veterans court supervision|VA treatment coordination|Peer support|Housing referrals|Structured reentry

name: Appling County DFCS — Family Assistance
description: Appling County DFCS — Family Assistance serves justice-involved adults and families rebuilding stability after incarceration in Appling County. Appling County DFCS Family Assistance office in Baxley processes SNAP, Medicaid, PeachCare, and TANF applications for Georgia residents including returning citizens reestablishing food and health benefits after release from Appling County Jail or GDC custody. Bring proof of identity, income, and release or residency documents when applying at a county office or online portal. Contact this resource to confirm current intake steps, required documents, and whether walk-ins or referrals are accepted.
description_es: Appling County DFCS — Family Assistance sirve a adultos con antecedentes penales y familias que reconstruyen estabilidad después de la encarcelación en condado de Appling. Lleve prueba de identidad, ingresos y documentos de liberación o residencia al solicitar en una oficina del condado o portal en línea. Contacte este recurso para confirmar pasos de admisión, documentos requeridos y si aceptan visitas sin cita o referencias.
eligibility: Appling County residents meeting income and household-size requirements for SNAP, Medicaid, PeachCare, and TANF; criminal record generally not a barrier.
eligibility_es: Residentes del condado Appling que cumplan requisitos de ingresos para SNAP, Medicaid, PeachCare y TANF; los antecedentes penales generalmente no son barrera.
notes: Apply online at compass.ga.gov or visit the county DFCS office; call 1-877-423-4746 for DFCS Customer Contact Center.
notes_es: Solicite en compass.ga.gov o visite la oficina DFCS del condado; llame al 1-877-423-4746.
hours: Typically Tuesday–Thursday, 9:00 a.m.–4:00 p.m. ET; call ahead
services: SNAP enrollment|Medicaid enrollment|Cash assistance (TANF)|Document assistance|Benefits navigation

Contact this resource to confirm current intake steps, required documents, and whether walk-ins or referrals are accepted.
description_es: Jackson County DFCS — Family Assistance sirve a adultos con antecedentes penales y familias que reconstruyen estabilidad después de la encarcelación en condado de Jackson. eligibility: Jackson County residents meeting income and household-size requirements for SNAP, Medicaid, PeachCare, and TANF; criminal record generally not a barrier.

name: GNTC — Catoosa County Adult Education
description: Georgia Northwestern Technical College operates the Shirley Smith Learning Center in Ringgold providing free GED and HiSET preparation, adult literacy, and workforce transition classes for Catoosa County residents including returning citizens rebuilding education credentials after release. Instructors connect graduates to technical college certificate programs and WorkSource Dalton career services in northwest Georgia. Enrollment and orientation required before classes begin—not walk-in testing without appointment.
description_es: Georgia Northwestern Technical College opera el Shirley Smith Learning Center en Ringgold con preparación GED y HiSET gratuita, alfabetización para adultos y clases de transición laboral para residentes del condado Catoosa, incluidos ciudadanos que regresan que reconstruyen credenciales educativas. Los instructores conectan graduados a programas de certificado y servicios WorkSource Dalton.
eligibility: Adults age 16+ in Catoosa County not enrolled in high school; justice-involved adults welcome.
eligibility_es: Adultos de 16 años o más en el condado Catoosa no inscritos en secundaria; adultos con antecedentes penales bienvenidos.
notes: Call 706-965-6155 ext. 7 for enrollment; free classes through TCSG adult education funding.
notes_es: Llame al 706-965-6155 ext. 7 para inscripción; clases gratuitas mediante financiamiento TCSG.
hours: Contact for class schedule
services: GED preparation|HiSET preparation|Adult literacy|Workforce transition|Technical college referrals

name: The DEO Clinic — Free Healthcare
description: The DEO Clinic provides free primary and chronic-disease care to low-income uninsured adults in Whitfield and Murray counties including justice-involved returning citizens establishing medical homes after release. Volunteers and staff treat hypertension, diabetes, COPD, and acute illnesses at the Mack Gaston Community Center clinic in Dalton with medication assistance and follow-up visits—not a hospital emergency department.
description_es: The DEO Clinic ofrece atención primaria gratuita y manejo de enfermedades crónicas para adultos sin seguro de bajos ingresos en los condados Whitfield y Murray, incluidos ciudadanos que regresan que establecen hogares médicos después de la liberación. Voluntarios y personal tratan hipertensión, diabetes y EPOC en la clínica del Mack Gaston Community Center en Dalton.
eligibility: Low-income uninsured residents of Whitfield or Murray County; justice-involved adults accepted.
eligibility_es: Residentes sin seguro de bajos ingresos de Whitfield o Murray; adultos con antecedentes penales aceptados.
notes: Call 706-581-2009 for appointment; chronic disease management and prescription assistance available.
notes_es: Llame al 706-581-2009 para cita; manejo de enfermedades crónicas y asistencia con recetas disponibles.
hours: Clinic hours vary; call for schedule
services: Primary care|Chronic disease management|Prescription assistance|Follow-up visits|Uninsured clinic services

name: United Way of Northwest Georgia
description: United Way of Northwest Georgia invests in education, basic needs, and health programs across Whitfield and Murray counties connecting low-income families—including returning citizens—to funded partners for food, housing stability, utility assistance, and financial counseling. The Dalton-based team coordinates 211 referrals, volunteer projects, and community action initiatives. A funding and navigation hub—not direct emergency shelter.
description_es: United Way of Northwest Georgia invierte en programas de educación, necesidades básicas y salud en los condados Whitfield y Murray conectando a familias de bajos ingresos—incluidos ciudadanos que regresan—a aliados financiados para alimentos, estabilidad de vivienda, servicios públicos y consejería financiera. Equipo con sede en Dalton coordina referencias 211 e iniciativas comunitarias.
eligibility: Residents of Whitfield and Murray counties seeking referrals to funded partner programs; open to justice-involved households.
eligibility_es: Residentes de Whitfield y Murray que buscan referencias a programas aliados financiados; abierto a hogares con antecedentes penales.
notes: Call 706-529-1591 or visit ourunitedway.org; partners include food, housing, and health agencies in Dalton area.
notes_es: Llame al 706-529-1591 o visite ourunitedway.org; aliados incluyen agencias de alimentos, vivienda y salud.
hours: Monday–Friday business hours
services: Community funding|Partner referrals|Basic needs navigation|Housing stability programs|Financial counseling partners

name: Community Action for Improvement (CAFI)
description: Community Action for Improvement is the community action agency for Carroll, Coweta, Heard, Meriwether, and Troup counties providing LIHEAP utility assistance, homeless prevention, employment readiness, veterans services, and reentry supports for low-income residents including returning citizens rebuilding stability. Service connection centers in LaGrange and county sites help clients access SNAP verification partners, housing resources, and WorkSource LaGrange career services. Appointment required for most financial assistance—not emergency shelter.
description_es: Community Action for Improvement es la agencia de acción comunitaria para los condados Carroll, Coweta, Heard, Meriwether y Troup que ofrece asistencia LIHEAP, prevención de personas sin hogar, preparación laboral, servicios para veteranos y apoyos de reinserción para residentes de bajos ingresos, incluidos ciudadanos que regresan. Centros de conexión de servicios en LaGrange ayudan a acceder a recursos de vivienda y WorkSource LaGrange.
eligibility: Low-income residents of Carroll, Coweta, Heard, Meriwether, or Troup counties; justice-involved adults eligible for reentry and housing prevention programs.
eligibility_es: Residentes de bajos ingresos de Carroll, Coweta, Heard, Meriwether o Troup; adultos con antecedentes penales elegibles para programas de reinserción.
notes: Schedule appointments at cafi-ga.org; reentry and homeless prevention services available—call 706-884-2651.
notes_es: Programe citas en cafi-ga.org; servicios de reinserción y prevención de personas sin hogar disponibles.
hours: Monday–Friday business hours; program hours vary
services: Reentry supports|Homeless prevention|LIHEAP utility assistance|Employment readiness|Veterans services|Service navigation

name: Christ Chapel Community Church — Food Pantry
description: Christ Chapel Community Church operates a food pantry in Zebulon serving low-income Pike County residents including returning citizens reestablishing food security after incarceration. The pantry provides groceries and referral connections to Griffin WorkSource and Pike County DFCS benefits offices. Call ahead for pantry hours and documentation requirements—not a hot meal shelter.
description_es: Christ Chapel Community Church opera una despensa de alimentos en Zebulon que sirve a residentes de bajos ingresos del condado Pike, incluidos ciudadanos que regresan que restablecen seguridad alimentaria después de la encarcelación. La despensa proporciona comestibles y conexiones de referencia a WorkSource Griffin y oficinas DFCS del condado.
eligibility: Low-income Pike County residents; contact pantry for intake requirements.
eligibility_es: Residentes de bajos ingresos del condado Pike; contacte la despensa para requisitos de admisión.
notes: Pantry hours Tue–Fri 9:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m.; call 770-567-1141 before visiting.
notes_es: Horario de despensa mar–vie 9:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m.; llame al 770-567-1141 antes de visitar.
hours: Tuesday–Friday 9:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m.
services: Food pantry|Grocery assistance|Community referrals|SNAP partner navigation

name: GNTC — Whitfield County Adult Education
description: Georgia Northwestern Technical College operates the Whitfield County Adult Learning Center in Dalton providing free GED and HiSET preparation, adult literacy, and workforce transition classes for Whitfield County residents including returning citizens rebuilding credentials after release. Instructors connect graduates to WorkSource Dalton, The DEO Clinic health partners, and technical college certificate programs. Contact the center for enrollment—not walk-in testing without orientation.
description_es: Georgia Northwestern Technical College opera el Centro de Aprendizaje para Adultos del condado Whitfield en Dalton con preparación GED y HiSET gratuita, alfabetización para adultos y clases de transición laboral para residentes del condado Whitfield, incluidos ciudadanos que regresan. Los instructores conectan graduados a WorkSource Dalton y programas de certificado.
eligibility: Adults age 16+ in Whitfield County; justice-involved adults welcome.
eligibility_es: Adultos de 16 años o más en el condado Whitfield; adultos con antecedentes penales bienvenidos.
notes: Call 706-272-2909 for enrollment; free TCSG-funded adult education classes.
notes_es: Llame al 706-272-2909 para inscripción; clases gratuitas financiadas por TCSG.
hours: Contact for class schedule
services: GED preparation|HiSET preparation|Adult literacy|Workforce transition|Technical college referrals

name: Southern Crescent Technical College — Griffin Adult Education
description: Southern Crescent Technical College provides free GED and HiSET preparation and adult education classes at its Griffin campus for Pike, Spalding, Lamar, and Upson county residents including returning citizens seeking high school equivalency credentials for Griffin WorkSource employment programs. Instructors help participants pass equivalency exams and transition to workforce certificates. Enrollment required before classes begin.
description_es: Southern Crescent Technical College ofrece preparación GED y HiSET gratuita y clases de educación para adultos en su campus de Griffin para residentes de los condados Pike, Spalding, Lamar y Upson, incluidos ciudadanos que regresan que buscan credenciales de equivalencia de secundaria para programas de empleo WorkSource Griffin.
eligibility: Adults age 16+ in service area counties; open to justice-involved participants.
eligibility_es: Adultos de 16 años o más en condados del área de servicio; abierto a participantes con antecedentes penales.
notes: Call 770-229-3176 for Griffin adult education enrollment; connects to WorkSource Griffin career center.
notes_es: Llame al 770-229-3176 para inscripción en educación para adultos en Griffin; conecta con WorkSource Griffin.
hours: Contact for class schedule
services: GED preparation|HiSET preparation|Adult literacy|Workforce certificates|Career center referrals
